---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Oracle2SSRS
title: "[Feature] <short summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I'm always
frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any API
shape, UI sketches, or example usage if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features
you've considered, and why the proposed solution is preferred.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- Oracle2SSRS version / commit SHA:

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or sample files about the feature
request here. If this affects the Oracle-to-SSRS conversion path, please
include a representative input snippet.
